title: Kiwanis Ravine Overlook, 36th Ave W, Seattle, WA 98199-1334, US
content: Kiwanis Ravine Overlook is a serene outdoor destination nestled in the heart of Seattle, WA. Visitors can enjoy breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape.

title: Kiwanis Ravine Overlook, Washington | Campendium
content: Kiwanis Ravine Overlook is a Community Park in WA. Plan your road trip to Kiwanis Ravine Overlook in WA with Roadtrippers.

title: Kiwanis Ravine - Wikipedia
content: Kiwanis Ravine is an 8.7-acre (3.5 ha) public park a block east of Discovery Park in the Magnolia neighborhood of Seattle, Washington.

title: OVERLOOK WALK - Updated June 2026 - 103 Photos & 12 Reviews
content: Love that they made this for the water front. So easy to walk through and beautiful to take in the area. From the buildings, Ferris wheel and bay.
